title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
